nodes.name: 南里奥格兰德州
nodes.summary: 南里奥格兰德州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联89种鸟类，包括孤䳍、黄腿穴䳍、Long-trained nightjar等89种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐

nodes.name: White-eyed foliage-gleaner
nodes.summary: White-eyed foliage-gleaner（White-eyed foliage-gleaner，学名 Automolus leucophthalmus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联9个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "Extensive deforestation within its range has dramatically reduced area of habitat available to this species, but it persists in small and degraded forest fragments, and appears to be reasonably tolerant of second growth." However, the nominate race is known from only a few sites and may merit threatened status
